report.title: WorkflowAI Pro: Workflow Intelligence & Adaptive UX/UI Design
report.abstract: This module specifies the Workflow Recommendation Engine and the Adaptive UI systems for WorkflowAI Pro. It details the active learning loop used for continuous optimization of agentic workflows and the dynamic UI state management that adjusts based on user skill, context, and cognitive load.
report.content:
# 1. Workflow Recommendation Engine
The recommendation engine provides users with the most efficient agentic "recipe" for a given task.
## 1.1 Active Learning Loop WorkflowAI Pro captures implicit and explicit feedback to refine its recommendations. - **Data Capture**: Interaction traces, task completion time, and user "thumbs up/down" are stored in the interaction telemetry stream. - **Model Refinement**: Asynchronous training of a **Hierarchical Graph Neural Network (HGNN)** that maps task descriptions to successful workflow topologies. - **Active Selection**: The system proactively asks for HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) verification on low-confidence recommendations to improve the "Gold Dataset."
## 1.2 Data Model: Workflow Intelligence ```json { "interaction_trace": { "user_id": "UUID", "workflow_id": "UUID", "skill_level": "Expert | Intermediate | Novice", "completion_score": 0.95, "cognitive_load_index": 0.4, "feedback_loop": { "is_successful": true, "human_correction": "Refactor step 2 to use mTLS" } } } ```
---
# 2. Adaptive UX/UI Systems
The frontend dynamically reconfigures its layout and complexity based on the **User Context Vector**.
## 2.1 Context-Aware Layouts - **Skill-Based Gating**: "Novice" users see simplified, guided wizards. "Expert" users see the "Glass Cockpit" with direct GDL editing and raw telemetry access. - **Cognitive Load Adaptive UI**: Monitoring P99 interaction latency. If the user exhibits high decision-delay, the UI automatically collapses non-essential components to reduce visual noise.
## 2.2 Adaptive Content Generation - **Automated Multi-Modal Enhancement**: GeminiService automatically generates alt-text for UI diagrams and provides TTS (Text-to-Speech) summaries for long-running task updates. - **Dynamic Localization**: Content is re-targeted for jurisdictional compliance (e.g., GDPR-mandated privacy notices for EU users).
## 2.3 Frontend State Management - **Next.js/React**: Using `useState` and `useEffect` for real-time risk score updates and incident tracking. - **ChatOps Synergy**: Direct bi-directional state sync between the dashboard and Slack/Teams webhooks.
